ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER MOHAMED, YASIR MOHAMED AHMED MOHAMED AHMED HEARING SET FOR APR-28-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF APR-28-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HIS NAME TO YASIR MOHAMED AHMED TALODI. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER MOHAMED, YASIR MOHAMED AHMED MOHAMED AHMED ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
